scripts.clean: rimraf core/dist web/backend/dist web/frontend/dist database/dist core/node_modules web/backend/node_modules web/frontend/node_modules database/node_modules node_modules logs .turbo
scripts.build:full: npm install && turbo run build && npm run db:setup
scripts.build:prod: npm install && turbo run build && npm run db:setup && cd web/frontend && npm run build
scripts.db:setup: cd database && npx prisma generate && node scripts/dedupe-player-names.js && npx prisma db push && npx tsx src/setup.ts
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently --names "CORE,WEB,UI" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "cd core && npm run dev" "cd web/backend && npm run dev" "cd web/frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && concurrently --names "CORE,WEB,UI" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta" "cd core && npx tsx src/app.ts" "cd web/backend && npx tsx src/server.ts" "cd web/frontend && npm run preview"
scripts.pm2:start: npm run build:prod && mkdir -p logs && pm2 start ecosystem.config.js && npm run pm2:setup
